ShortDescription.Value: Auto-Clean garbage OR use Trash Boss = Self manage trucks + facilities

Publish.LongDescription:
**Magic Garbage + Trash Boss**
Two ways to handle garbage, a Status Report option, and all new POWER Users section for experiments. ---
### OPTION 1 AUTO CLEAN - ✅ **Total Magic On** - Removes all garbage automatically. - Garbage warning icons cleared - Trucks and facilities become mostly cosmetic. - Mod does not stop Garbage system; cleanup is just very fast.
### OPTION 2 SELF MANAGE - ✅ **Trash Boss On** - Keep vanilla garbage gameplay, and allows adjustable garbage values. - Adjust garbage trucks, facilities, other factors to reduce traffic and service strain. - 🚚 Great for players who still want to see trucks driving around, with fewer problems.
**Threshold slider** - Advanced option (mod worked fine before this slider; it's bonus for power users) - Increase means garbage levels can be much higher before the building calls for a truck (reduce truck dispatches). May need higher truck capacity. Balance advised: use status log button to check details while tweaking this. Allow city to run a few hours between threshold changes to get better analysis.
**Helper buttons** - [Game Defaults] = reset all sliders to 100% (pure vanilla). - [Recommended] = suggested preset values for easy management. - Standard Trash Boss buttons do not change Power User section.
### NEW STATUS Report - Real garbage stats help a Trash Boss figure out what is happening. - Lean: status does not run in-city per frame; runs in Options menu for best performance to not affect gameplay.
### NEW OPTIONAL POWER USER - Not needed for most players; allows advanced tuning and experimentation. - Most cities get good results just using the Trash Boss Options and not touching Power User settings. - Extra controls: - Dispatch Request Threshold + Pickup Threshold - **Pickup** cannot be higher than **Dispatch Request**. - Garbage Happiness Baseline + Garbage Happiness Step - Garbage Accumulation Rate (not needed for most cities, this is a powerful adjustment, use with caution) - Higher thresholds can reduce truck traffic, but too high can slow pickups too much.
#### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
---
### Compatibility - Works with new and existing cities. Safe to remove any time. - Does not use Harmony patch, lightweight; anything with sliders is done in options menu, not in-game, for best performance.
---
### Credits - RiverMochi - author - Thanks to Wayz for inspiration on the original Magical Garbage mod - yenyang - code review, tech advice - Necko1996 - testing, screenshots - gagaxm - truck image
#### 11 languages - English, Français French, Deutsch German, Español Spanish, Italiano Italian - 日本語 Japanese, 한국어 Korean, Português Brasil, Polski Polish - 简体中文 Simplified Chinese, 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese
Publish.ChangeLog: * added optional Power User advanced settings for garbage tuning * added Garbage Accumulation Rate for power users to tinker with; not needed for most cities. * added optional Building threshold slider; triggers when a truck is dispatched * added more detailed Status log info to mod Options menu. * updated all locale files.
